name: Africa Re
description: A global reinsurance group and one of the top 50 global reinsurance groups by AM Best in 2018, with broad-based shareholding from African states, the African Development Bank, African insurers and reinsurers, and global insurers.

* **African Reinsurance Corporation**
# African Reinsurance Corporation
**African Reinsurance Corporation (Africa Re)** is the leading pan-African reinsurance company and the largest reinsurer in **Africa** in terms of net reinsurance written premiums.
Africa Re was set up by **36 African states in 1976** , following a recommendation by the African Development Bank (AfDB), with the mission of developing the insurance and reinsurance industry in Africa through increased underwriting and retention capacities, and support to African economic development.
> Besides its dedication to professional insurance capacity building and technical assistance to African insurers, Africa Re participates in the equity of major regional development institutions: Africa Export-Import Bank (AFREXIMBANK), Shelter Afrique**,** African Trade Insurance Agency (ATI), Preferential Trade Area Bank (PTA Bank) and invests significantly in African financial markets.
![](https://siga.gov.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/AFRICA-Re.jpg)

tavily.answer:
Africa Re's official website is www.africa-re.com. It is a leading Pan-African reinsurance company headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. Established in 1976, it supports economic development in Africa.
Africa Re is a leading reinsurer in Africa, founded in 1976, with headquarters in Lagos, Nigeria. It serves clients across Africa, the Middle East, Asia, and Latin America. Africa Re focuses on developing African insurance markets and value creation.
Africa Re was established in 1976 and is the leading pan-African reinsurance company. It aims to develop the insurance industry in Africa and support economic growth. It operates from eight locations across the continent.
Africa Re is a leading pan-African reinsurance company established in 1976 to develop the insurance industry in Africa. It has a significant market share and supports economic development. Africa Re is also involved in corporate social responsibility initiatives.
Africa Re is a reinsurance company founded in 1976 in Cameroon. It operates in 41 African countries. It provides reinsurance, insurance, and asset management services.
